title: GET /api/admin/audit — recent audit_log feed (operator only)
problem: AdminAudit needs a feed of recent audit_log entries; this endpoint serves that. Operator-only, returns the most recent entries ordered ts DESC. Tenant-scoped via requireTenant — audit_log is per-tenant so a fleet admin doesn't see another tenant's actions.
analysis: GET only. currentEmail → unauthorized if missing. isAdmin → forbidden if not operator. requireTenant → ctx.data.tenant or 500. SELECT FROM audit_log WHERE tenant_id = ? ORDER BY ts DESC LIMIT N (N defined at top of file, currently 200). Returns array of AuditRow. No filter params today; AdminAudit does the filtering client-side.

decisions.rationale: audit_log is small. Returning the most-recent 200 covers every realistic operator query. A LIMIT-without-pagination is simpler than a paginated API; AdminAudit's client-side filtering handles search.
decisions.recommendation: When the log crosses ~1000 entries per tenant, add a /api/admin/audit?cursor=... param. Don't over-engineer earlier.

decisions.rationale: audit_log entries are per-tenant. Filtering at the SQL level (not in app code) means even a misconfigured admin can't accidentally see another tenant's log. requireTenant guarantees tenant_id is non-null.
decisions.recommendation: When adding new admin endpoints that touch audit_log, thread tenant the same way.

successCriteria:
- Operator gets recent audit_log (tenant-scoped)
- Non-operator → 403
- Anon → 401
- Tenant lookup failure → 500 (requireTenant)
- Newest-first ordering
- Server-side LIMIT prevents giant responses
implementation: functions/api/admin/audit.ts — single onRequestGet. AuditRow interface. Tests: covered indirectly by admin integration tests.
userGuide: Consumed by src/pages/AdminAudit.tsx. To query directly: curl https://marcportal.com/api/admin/audit -b 'mp_session=<admin>'. To insert manually for testing: INSERT INTO audit_log (id, ts, actor_email, tenant_id, action, payload) VALUES (...).
knownLimitations: No pagination; LIMIT is fixed server-side
No date range / actor filter at the API; client filters
Payload column is opaque JSON; structured search would require JSON1 or a dedicated index
Insertion into audit_log is best-effort from emitting handlers; a silent miss has no detection

statusHistory.reason: Endpoint shipped paired with AdminAudit page.
Code-first doc co-located. Tenant scoping + LIMIT pattern stable.
